_comment_runtime_gates: Default integration coverage requires real activation and ADS on a configured TwinCAT machine. OEM signing certificate grant/sign/verify are explicit exclusions unless enabled locally.
_comment_signing: Only fill and enable these when this machine has a real TwinCAT OEM signing certificate/private key. signing.set-license is still verified without these values.
_comment_CppModuleWizardId: Reserved. Not used by current tests — default CreateCppProject (TcVersionedDriverWizard) auto-creates the module via TriggerAddModule=true.
